title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: app.py:88 returns all rows unconditionally via SELECT * FROM books ORDER BY id
suggestion: Add ?limit and ?offset query params for large collections

title: No ISBN uniqueness constraint
evidence: app.py:22-28 CREATE TABLE has no UNIQUE constraint on isbn column
suggestion: Add UNIQUE constraint on isbn if business rules require it

title: No year validation on create/update
evidence: app.py:69 year is passed directly to SQLite without type or range validation
suggestion: Validate year is an integer and within a reasonable range
